input_text:
The app service was failing to start in Docker Compose with "could not connect to database" errors. The DATABASE_URL environment variable was referencing "postgres" as the hostname, but the service in docker-compose.yml was named "db".

Docker Compose uses service names as hostnames. Fixed the DATABASE_URL to reference "db" instead of "postgres". Service started correctly.
reviewer_notes: Compose service-name typo fix. Resolved config bug.
